steps.title: Identify the defining quality
steps.content: The passage specifies what quality survives when the work moves from spoken to printed: pleasant musical quality. The blank must name this characteristic.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: Melodic directly expresses a musical, tuneful quality — the character that endures in both spoken and written forms. Scholarly, jarring, and personal each miss the sonic dimension or contradict pleasant. That is the correct answer.
